name: MYRadiologyHISOrderPlacerCapabilityStatement
title: MY Radiology HIS Order Placer CapabilityStatement
publisher: Data Team, Digital Health Division, Ministry of Health Malaysia
description: Client capability expectations for a HIS or CPOE system that places radiology orders and consumes workflow acknowledgements.

searchParam.name: identifier
searchParam.documentation: Search by order identifier or accession identifier.

searchParam.name: patient
searchParam.documentation: Search radiology orders for a specific patient.

searchParam.name: status
searchParam.documentation: Search radiology orders by ServiceRequest status.

searchParam.documentation: Search radiology orders by authored date.

searchParam.name: category
searchParam.documentation: Search radiology orders by imaging or radiology category.

searchParam.name: status
searchParam.documentation: Search workflow tasks by Task status.

searchParam.name: authored-on

searchParam.name: based-on
searchParam.documentation: Search booked appointments by the originating order.
